details.test: Task 1: Affordable cremation package with viewing + info request
Task 2: Pre-need burial estimate (weekday morning) and email
Task 3: Select visitation room (>=60 guests, A/V) and add to plan
Task 4: Choose two floral arrangements under $75 and add to plan
Task 5: Find obituary for Maria Hernandez, sign guestbook, and RSVP
Task 6: Find weekday evening support group within 10 miles of 19103 and register
Task 7: Select eco-friendly or budget casket under $2,500 and add to "Green burial plan"
Task 8: Schedule in-person consultation weekday morning within next 14 days
Task 9: Plan veterans/military-honors style package and request callback
